member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.UseProApi
member.summary: Foloseste endpoint-ul DeepL Pro (true) sau Free (false).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.TranslateGenres
member.summary: Traduce genurile folosind dictionarul intern (fara apel API).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.TranslateTags
member.summary: Traduce etichetele/tags folosind dictionarul intern (fara apel API).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.OverwriteExisting
member.summary: Suprascrie chiar daca campul e deja blocat/tradus. ATENTIE: va retraduce tot de la zero.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.RequestsPerMinute
member.summary: Numarul maxim de cereri DeepL API per minut.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Providers.RoMovieMetadataProvider
member.summary: Provider pentru filme - ruleaza dupa TMDB si aplica traducerea + lock.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Services.GenreTagDictionary
member.summary: Dictionare statice pentru genuri si etichete comune din TMDB. Traducere rapida fara apel API pentru termeni standard.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Services.GenreTagDictionary.TranslateGenre(System.String)
member.summary: Incearca sa traducă un gen. Returneaza genul original daca nu e in dictionar.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Services.GenreTagDictionary.TranslateTag(System.String)
member.summary: Incearca sa traducă o eticheta. Returneaza eticheta originala daca nu e in dictionar.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Services.TranslationLockService
member.summary: Tine evidenta itemelor deja traduse pentru a preveni suprascrierea la refresh. Persista datele pe disc in fisierul translated_items.json.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Services.TranslationLockService.MarkTranslated(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Marcheaza un camp al unui item ca tradus si blocat.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Services.TranslationLockService.IsLocked(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Verifica daca un camp al unui item este blocat (deja tradus).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Services.TranslationLockService.ClearLocks(System.Guid)
member.summary: Elimina lock-urile unui item (pentru a permite re-traducerea).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.RoTranslator.Services.TranslationLockService.GetAllLocks
member.summary: Returneaza toti itemii cu campuri blocate (pentru UI/debug).
